# GitHub Labels — IFlemma V2

Diese Labels bitte manuell im GitHub-Interface unter **Issues → Labels** anlegen.

## Bereich (`area:`)

| Name | Farbe | Beschreibung |
|---|---|---|
| `area:retrieval` | `#0075ca` | Hybrid Search, Embeddings, Ranking |
| `area:db` | `#e4e669` | SQLite Schema, Migrationen |
| `area:mcp` | `#a2eeef` | MCP Tools, Injection, Protocol |
| `area:security` | `#d93f0b` | Secret Redaction, local-first, Auth |
| `area:guides` | `#0e8a16` | Guide-System, Distillation |
| `area:sessions` | `#5319e7` | Session Tracking, Dead Ends, Goals |
| `area:evals` | `#f9d0c4` | Benchmarks, Eval Harness |

## Typ (`type:`)

| Name | Farbe | Beschreibung |
|---|---|---|
| `type:feature` | `#a2eeef` | Neues Feature |
| `type:bug` | `#d73a4a` | Fehler |
| `type:refactor` | `#e4e669` | Refactoring |
| `type:docs` | `#0075ca` | Dokumentation |
| `type:test` | `#0e8a16` | Tests |

## Priorität (`priority:`)

| Name | Farbe | Beschreibung |
|---|---|---|
| `priority:p0` | `#b60205` | Kritisch / Blocker |
| `priority:p1` | `#d93f0b` | Hoch |
| `priority:p2` | `#e4e669` | Normal |
| `priority:p3` | `#cfd3d7` | Nice to have |

## Status

| Name | Farbe | Beschreibung |
|---|---|---|
| `status:blocked` | `#b60205` | Wartet auf externe Abhängigkeit |
| `status:in-progress` | `#0075ca` | Wird aktiv bearbeitet |
| `status:needs-review` | `#5319e7` | Wartet auf Review |
| `good first issue` | `#7057ff` | Gut für Einsteiger |
